reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username upon request with proper account access flow
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with sidebar containing three agents
Found "QA-20260417-180007-k6kp" agent in sidebar with status "idle" — Agent was visible and clickable in the agent list
Clicked the agent to open its detail page — Agent page loaded successfully, showing agent name, status as "idle", and message input interface
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status confirmed as acceptable per requirements ("running" or "idle")
Clicked message input field and typed the message — Message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." was successfully entered
Clicked Send button to submit the message — Message was sent and agent transitioned to "working" state
Waited for GitHub account access request card to appear — After ~3 seconds, account access request card appeared asking to grant GitHub access with a pre-selected GitHub account
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — Access was granted and agent resumed working
Waited for API request review card — After ~5 more seconds, API request review card appeared asking to allow "Get the authenticated user" GitHub API request
Clicked "Allow" button on API request review card — Options dialog appeared with "Allow Once", "Always allow user", and other options
Clicked "Allow Once" to permit the single request — Request was allowed and agent completed its work
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with the username shown in bold text

Took full page screenshot showing the complete interaction with response visible — Screenshot captured at page-2026-04-17T18-01-13-401Z.png showing the agent's successful response with GitHub username "yiw190"
